data.title: Dow Tumbles More Than 700 Points: Investor Sentiment Declines, Fear & Greed Index In 'Extreme Fear' Zone
data.description: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index demonstrated a rise in fear, reaching the "Extreme Fear" zone on Thursday. U.S. stocks closed lower on the same day, with the Dow Jones index dropping more than 700 points amid escalating tensions in Iran, fueled by soaring crude oil prices triggering fears of stagflation. Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei emphasized the continued closure of the Strait of Hormuz, a vital passage for about 20% of the world's oil supply. Dollar General Corp. (NYSE: DG) shares plummeted by approximately 6% following the release of their fourth-quarter earnings. Netskope Inc. (NASDAQ: NTSK) also experienced a downfall of over 21% post-earnings report. For the detailed report, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Price of OP expected to reach $0.13-$0.15 by end of March despite challenges. Short-term target $0.13 and critical support at $0.12.
data.description: In recent market analysis, predictions for OP price fluctuations have been outlined. For the short term, a target of $0.13 is set within a week. Looking further ahead, the medium-term forecast spanning a month suggests a range between $0.13 and $0.15. An optimistic breakout level is marked at $0.13, while a crucial support level is identified at $0.12. These projections are indicative of potential movements in the immediate future within the stated price parameters.

data.title: ATOM price targeting $2.11 resistance by April 2026. Currently at $1.85, neutral RSI at 44. Technical analysis shows potential rally, but bearish MACD cautions for March-April.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Cosmos (ATOM) is currently priced at $1.85, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) reading of 44. Technical analysis indicates a possible uptrend towards the $2.11 resistance level on the Bollinger Bands. However, bearish signals from the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicator advise caution for the months of March and April.

data.title: Bitcoin Cash (BCH) aims $520 recovery by April 2026. Currently stagnating at $464.90, RSI at 43.79. Bears may drive price to $441 support.
data.description: The current price of Bitcoin Cash is at $464.90, showing a neutral momentum as indicated by the RSI of 43.79. Analysis suggests a possible upward movement towards the $520 resistance level, but there is also a risk of bears driving BCH down to the $441 support area.
